title: Geepas 1200W Compact Food Processor | Multifunctional Electric Food Mixer with Chopper Knead Dough Shredder Slicing Grating & Emulsifying disc, 2 Speed with Pulse | 1.5L Mixing Bowl | 2 Years Warranty
features: 1200W POWERFUL PROCESSOR: With a 1200W powerful motor and pulse function, you can chop, grate, slice, shred, knead dough easily and efficiently. The machine is also designed with 2 speeds to meet all your needs when preparing food. Modern stainless steel decoration adds to the looks.

2 SPEED AND 1 PULSE FUNCTION- There are two different speed modes. "Speed 1" for soft ingredients & "Speed 2" is well suited to chop onions or shred, slice, grate or rasp vegetables and with the pulse function you can ground meat, knead dough easily and efficiently.

QUICK & EASY FOOD PREP,a 1.5L BOWL – One machine to chop, mix, grate, shred, slice and make dough, and emulsify ingredients in one. The generous 1.5L capacity mixing bowl, boasting an extra-wide chute which allows you to process a large number of ingredients at once, making it easier to prepare healthy delicious soups and perfect cake mixtures.

ACCESSORIES INCLUDED, EASY CLEAN & EASY USE – Dough blade, chopping blade, fine grater, coarse grater, slicing blade & emulsifying disc. Simple controls, manual settings with removable dishwasher-safe parts.
description: Product Description 2 SPEED SETTINGS & PULSE Simply change settings with the easy-to-use control dial. DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL BLADES Ensures fast and efficient chopping with stainless steel blades. MULTIFUNCTIONAL FOOD PROCESSOR With this process you can use Chop, mix, grate, shred, and more. SAFETY GUARANTEED Features double safety lock on the bowl and non-slip feet. BOWL CAPACITY 1.5L The generous 1.5L capacity mixing bowl, boasting an extra-wide chute which allows you to process. SAFETY LOCK The processor will not start until you lock the bowl cover and bowl. POWERFUL COPPER MOTOR With a 1200W powerful motor and pulse function, you can chop, grate, slice, shred, knead dough easily and efficiently. VARIETY OF ACCESSORIES Meets most demands of cooking preparation with variety of accessories.
